The illusory Apple global supply chain OEM template in the original data has been completely cleared to zero. However, the forensic logic engine directly penetrated this facade, which is thick enough to build a power station, grasping its two fatal flaws: first, its paid-in capital is a pitiful 20,000 RMB! The logical deduction instantly turned into a trial on commercial magical realism: holding 20,000 RMB (perhaps not even enough to buy the door of a high-voltage switchgear), the boss hasn't hired a single employee, and claims to have built a manufacturing base covering valves, busbars, and explosion-proof electrical appliances? Even more magical is the latter half of its license, where 'accommodation services; cigarette retail' suddenly appeared! The probe mercilessly deleted all 'manufacturing' bragging words, extracting the actual work it can do in the real world: 'reselling of electromechanical equipment and hardware pipe fittings; opening a small motel; selling cigarettes.' The truth is starkly naked and full of the earthy vibe of the urban-rural fringe: this is a 100% pure 0-Employee Hardware Broker & Small Motel/Store (an extremely low-capital shell). The boss highly likely opened a small storefront with accommodation near an industrial park; the first floor sells hardware accessories, valves, and cigarettes, while upstairs provides lodging. To catch some orders from park factories buying distribution boxes or electromechanical equipment, he spent 20,000 RMB to register this 'electromechanical manufacturing plant' shell for invoicing.
